text: Aaj phir meri maa ne sabke samne meri tulna apni beti ke sasural ki ameeri se ki aur taana maara ki main shehar jaakar bhi zyada paise nahi bhej pa raha. Uske baad se mere sir mein itna bhayanak dard hai jaise nasein phat jayengi aur aankhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai. Metro ki bheed mein jane ki baat toh door, mujhse bistar se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi, pura badan jaise pathar ho gaya hai.

Jab maa ne sabke beech kaha ki unki beti ka rishta zyada unche ghar mein hua hai aur main yahan akela reh kar bas kharcha badha raha hoon, mere pet mein ajeeb si jalan shuru ho gayi. Kal raat se kuch bhi hazam nahi ho raha aur seene mein aisi bhari-pan hai jaise koi aag lagi ho. Is joint family ke kalesh mein meri tabiyat itni gir gayi hai ki haath-pair bilkul thande pad gaye hain.

Har waqt maa ka domination aur unki beti se comparison sunte-sunte mera gala ghutne lagta hai aur dimaag sunn ho jata hai. Aaj phir wahi behes hui aur tabse meri saans phool rahi hai, lagta hai jaise dil par kisi ne bhari pathar rakh diya ho. Shehar mein language gap ki wajah se pehle hi akela hoon, upar se ab ye kamzori aa gayi hai ki bolte waqt bhi pair kaanp rahe hain.

Privacy toh zero hai is ghar mein, upar se maa ne aaj phir meri urban life par chot ki aur apni beti ke sanskaron ki tareefo ke pull baandh diye. Us argument ke baad se meri pith aur kandhon mein aisi jakdan ho rahi hai ki main seedha khada bhi nahi ho pa raha hoon. Pura sharir jaise toot raha hai aur ajeeb si bechaini ho rahi hai jisse neend hi nahi aa rahi.

Jab bhi maa meri mardangi aur shehar ki kamai ko lekar izzat ka waasta deti hain aur apni beti ki tareef karti hain, mere kaano mein seetiyaan bajne lagti hain. Aaj subah se itni thakan hai ki lagta hai bukhar chadh jayega aur pura badan dukh raha hai. Mujhse ab ye remittance ka bojh aur roz ka kalesh bardaasht nahi ho raha, sharir jawab de raha hai.
